name: Ground Beef Stroganoff
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, saute onions in butter until they are browned.
2. Add the ground beef to the skillet and cook until it is lightly browned as well.
3. Stir in the flour, catsup, Worcestershire sauce, sour cream, salt, and pepper.
4. Simmer the mixture for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Serve over egg noodles or rice.
